title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
